creator: ernst@jollem.com
text:
Okay, I've created a new diff file. This time, I changed the maintainer to 
myself, as agreed with the former maintainer. I've also added another mirror 
site.

The new shar file has been attached, and it can also be fetched from:

   * http://jollem.com/~ernst/jad-port_1.5.7f--1.5.8c.diff

/Ernst
